rulings.Case Title: HANH TRUONG VS. RAYMOND WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 14, 2017, line 4. PLAINTIFF HANH TRUONG'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction. Hearing Required to address whether Wong intended to re-instate Truong's tenancy (terminated by August 22, 2016 Notice to Pay or Quit) by serving May 2, 2017 notice for rent increase, i.e. change of terms of tenancy. If Wong so intended, August 22, 2016 Notice is waived and action CUD-16-656519 shall be dismissed. If Wong did not so intend, the Notice of Rent increase cannot serve to circumvent Court's January 30, 2017 Order and cannot be enforced until this matter is resolved. Truong to file a declaration regarding his intent as of August 22, 2016 no later than 9:00 a.m. on August 14, 2017. Courtesy copy to be delivered to department 501 no later than 9:15 a.m. on August 14, 2017. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HANH TRUONG VS. RAYMOND WONG ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 14, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT RAYMOND WONG'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. GRANTED. First Amended Answer to be filed and served forthwith. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS NORRIS ET AL VS. CALIBER HOME LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CUD-17-657897 WITH CASE CGC-17-557983
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 14, 2017, line 5. PLAINTIFFS CHRIS NORRIS, ELIZABETH NORRIS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS, CUD-17-657897 WITH CASE CGC-17-557983. DENIED. Moving party is no longer a party to the unlawful detainer action. The only remaining party in the unlawful detainer action is the purported tenant. Moving party does not meet the requirements under CCP 1048 and/or Martin-Bragg v. Moore (2013) 219 Cal.App.4th 367. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRECKENRIDGE PROPERTY FUND 2016, LLC VS. CHRIS NORRIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 14, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANTS CHRIS NORRIS, ELIZABETH NORRIS' Motion For Reconsideration. Hearing Required to address why the Court should not reconsider it's June 16, 2017 re: May 26 and May 30, 2017 hearings. Plaintiff to be ready to (1) present OnTrac confirmation for service of May 26, 2017 motion on Chris and Elizabeth Norris; (2) address why May 30, 2017 hearing date was in compliance with CCP 1005 and CCP 1013 (noticed on 14th day after service); (3) why Plaintiff failed to inform the Court that discovery responses have been received prior to the hearing date; (4) the date and the manner in which responses have been received. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRECKENRIDGE PROPERTY FUND 2016, LLC VS. CHRIS NORRIS ET AL
